label.description: canonical label: English, lowercase snake_case, whole words (press_button, light_on); homonyms disambiguated by qualification (charge_battery, charge_attack)

category.description: REQUIRED and CLOSED so identity inputs are deterministic; extending this enumeration is a MAJOR version change (GOVERNANCE.md)

stratum.description: OPTIONAL, IDENTITY-BEARING: the level of description at which this occurrent is pitched (2.0.0 N3.3)
